_purpose: Rosetta layer: maps EARNED pure-math structure to interpretive labels. The sims contain NO labels; all naming lives here. Each overlay carries an earned_status so nothing is forced onto the structure.
_discipline: Structure first (indices only), labels second (earned). An overlay is admitted only where the pure structure independently supports it. 'witness' = usable symbolic crosswalk, must not replace the math anchor. 'earned' = the structure realizes it exactly. 'candidate' = suggested, not yet closed.

structural_primitives.eps: sheet sign in {+1,-1}: Hamiltonian H = eps*H0. Left/right Weyl sheet.
structural_primitives.a1: dynamics bit in {0,1}: 1 = spectrum-preserving (unitary) channel; 0 = spectrum-contracting (rank-1 dephasing) channel. Lives in the EIGENVALUE sector.
structural_primitives.a2: frame bit in {0,1}: 1 = conjugated frame rho->V^dag rho V; 0 = identity frame. GAUGE d.o.f.; lives in the EIGENVECTOR sector.
structural_primitives.p: parity bit = a1 XOR a2. The third observed 2|2 split; not linearly separable in (a1,a2).
structural_primitives.note: The four objects (a1,a2) in {0,1}^2, each with a sheet sign eps, are the pure objects. 8 = 2(eps) x 4(a1,a2). With operator choice x4 and flux this extends to the 64 schedule.

map.p->Axis0: p = a1 XOR a2 = Axis-0 discrete N/S projection: p=1 -> N {Ne,Ni}, p=0 -> S {Se,Si}

axis_math_anchor.evidence: Verified exactly against repo operator table (igt-pattern lines 475-478); parity identity in axis0_xor_sim.py; sector theorem in axis0_sector_sim.py.

terrain_names.evidence: Matches terrain-rosetta-strong-math and terrain-laws-and-loop-geometry generator placements.

map.a1,a2 fix the specific function: Se/Ne/Ni/Si assignment via the (a1,a2) tuple; the 8-of-16 access law is a separate engine-role overlay

jungian_functions.caution: Jungian naming is a witness crosswalk. The math anchor is (a1,a2,eps); do not let 'intuition/sensing' drive the structure. Axis-0=intuition/sensing is the DISCRETE projection only; the continuous Phi_0(rho_AB) bridge is open.

structural_correspondence.Carnot 4-stage: isothermal<->adiabatic alternation = dissipative(a1=0)<->unitary(a1=1) alternation in the E/U loop composition. The 4-stage cycle = the UEUE/EUEU loop word.
structural_correspondence.Szilard 1-bit: measure->extract->reset = dephasing channel (a1=0) + entropy bookkeeping. Landauer erasure cost = the entropy-sector charge.
structural_correspondence.dual-stacked: 2 engines (eps=+ deductive, eps=- inductive) = owner's 'both stacked' target.

carnot_szilard.caution: Structural analogy only. Per owner + igt-pattern: the actual engine must be PURE QIT — no classical thermodynamics/probability smuggled in. The correspondence is a teaching pattern for the 4-stage and inner/outer loop, not an admission of classical thermo.
carnot_szilard.what_is_genuinely_shared: 4-stage cycle structure; inner/outer loop nesting; work<->information conversion; two independent binary axes (win/lose x WIN/LOSE = the 4-ring, matching (a1,a2)).

map.Axis-0 white/yang vs black/yin: = p (N/S), still open at the Phi_0(rho_AB) bridge; symbolic split usable, must not close the bridge
map.the two seed-dots (yin holds yang seed,: candidate witness for the XOR/parity: each class carries a seed of the other = the two charges disagreeing

taijitu_yinyang.caution: Per taijitu-probe-reconciliation-card: symbolic witness only, must not replace lower-stack math. The 'surprisingly coordinated' fit is real as a crosswalk; it is NOT evidence and NOT forced onto the structure.
taijitu_yinyang.note_on_seed_dots: The taijitu seed-dot (each half contains a dot of the other) is a genuinely apt witness for a1 XOR a2: the N class is exactly where the two charges DISAGREE (each 'contains' the other). Recorded as candidate, not forced.

map.6 binary axes -> hexagram: the 2^6=64 schedule (2 eps x 8 terrain-slots x 4 operators, or 6 binary axes) matches the 64 hexagrams as a COUNT
map.line order matters: N01 order-sensitivity = the hexagram is an ordered stack of lines

iching.caution: Owner's explicit stance: do NOT force I-Ching patterns on. The system, as it develops, may naturally reflect them. Recorded as a candidate correspondence to CHECK as structure is earned, never as a design input. Current status: 64-count matches; per-hexagram semantic map is unverified and fenced.
iching.honest_status: Only the 64 count is structurally grounded so far (2^6). Any line-by-line I-Ching semantics remain unearned and must not steer the sims.

provenance: Grounded in: igt-pattern-explicit-math-reference (operator table, Carnot/Szilard rows, 4-ring), taijitu-probe-reconciliation-card (witness fencing), empirical-math-rosetta (math-first discipline), terrain-rosetta-strong-math (terrain placements). Claude Science session 2026-07-01. scratch/witness; promotion_allowed=false.
